sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39821" key="e)pikopa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-κοπάς</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γῆ</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">land</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleared of trees, PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2316" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2316</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii B.C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
